title: Camp Cobblemon - Lightly Modded Cobblemon + Builder Tools
description: A lightly modded experience for the private server, Camp Cobblemon! Includes tools for builders, backpacks, drawers, and other quality-of-life mods.
body:
![Banner for Camp Cobblemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d788724a15992cac41415b92e1d86e71a892b6_0.webp)

## What is Camp Cobblemon?
- Camp Cobblemon adds onto the Official Cobblemon Modpack some **quality-of-life mods while not adding extra Cobblemon Content**. We are trying to keep the _modpack as lighlty modded as possible_ for players who enjoy lightly modded experiences.
- This modpack is meant for **single-player and multiplayer experiences.**
- While this modpack is built for the Camp Cobblemon server, it is **free for anyone to use** for a lightly modded Cobblemon modpack.
- This is also a **builder-focused pack**, adding in mods such as _Axiom and Litematica_.
## What mods are in this pack?
